parameters.text:
Extract structured invoice data from this invoice document.

Return ONLY raw JSON.
Do not wrap in markdown.
Do not use code fences.
Do not add explanation text.

Critical requirements:
- line_items must ALWAYS be an array (use [] if no reliable rows)
- Never merge multiple printed rows into one row
- Never repeat first row for all rows
- Do not include subtotal/tax/round-off/grand-total summary rows as line items
- If duplicate copy pages exist (ORIGINAL/DUPLICATE/TRANSPORTER), extract rows only once unless continuation rows exist
- Use null for missing fields
- Do not hallucinate quantity/rate/unit when absent
- If only description + amount are visible, keep quantity/rate/unit as null
- Keep invoice_number exactly as printed

Tax rules:
- Extract invoice-level tax totals separately
- Extract line-item cgst/sgst/igst only if tax is explicitly printed for that row
- If tax appears only in HSN summary or invoice summary, set line-item cgst/sgst/igst to null
- Do not infer row-level tax from totals/rates
- If HSN-wise tax summary is present, extract it into hsn_tax_summary array

Return this schema:
{
  "vendor_name": string|null,
  "vendor_gstin": string|null,
  "buyer_name": string|null,
  "buyer_gstin": string|null,
  "invoice_number": string|null,
  "invoice_date": string|null,
  "state": string|null,
  "subtotal": number|null,
  "cgst": number|null,
  "sgst": number|null,
  "igst": number|null,
  "tds": number|null,
  "round_off": number|null,
  "total_amount": number|null,
  "line_items": [
    {
      "line_no": number|null,
      "description": string|null,
      "hsn": string|null,
      "quantity": number|null,
      "quantity_raw": string|null,
      "uom": string|null,
      "rate": number|null,
      "taxable_amount": number|null,
      "cgst": number|null,
      "cgst_raw": string|null,
      "sgst": number|null,
      "sgst_raw": string|null,
      "igst": number|null,
      "igst_raw": string|null,
      "total_amount": number|null
    }
  ],
  "hsn_tax_summary": [
    {
      "hsn": string|null,
      "taxable_amount": number|null,
      "cgst_rate": number|null,
      "cgst": number|null,
      "sgst_rate": number|null,
      "sgst": number|null,
      "igst_rate": number|null,
      "igst": number|null
    }
  ]
}

values.fileId: ={{ (() => { const candidates = [ $json.id, $json.file_id, $json.fileId, ($json.file && $json.file.id), ($json.data && $json.data.id), ($json.body && $json.body.file_id), ($json.body && $json.body.fileId), ($json.body && $json.body.id) ]; for (const value of candidates) { const v = String(value || "").trim(); if (v.startsWith("file-")) return v; } return ""; })() }}

parameters.text:
The previous response was truncated or invalid.

Return only one single-line minified JSON object.
Do not use markdown.
Do not use code fences.
Do not add explanations.
Do not add any extra text before or after the JSON.

Rules:
- Match the required schema exactly
- Use null for unknown values
- If line items are uncertain, return line_items as []
- Never stop mid-object
- Prefer valid compact JSON over completeness

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ extraction_status: 'FAILED', retry_count: (($json.retryCount ?? 0) + 1), raw_model_output: ($json._meta || {}), extracted_json: ($json || {}), normalized_fields: { invoice_number: ($json.invoice_number || null), invoice_date: ($json.invoice_date || null), party_name: ($json.vendor_name || $json.buyer_name || null), party_gstin: ($json.vendor_gstin || $json.buyer_gstin || null), currency: ($json.currency || 'INR'), subtotal: ($json.subtotal ?? $json.taxable_amount ?? null), taxable_amount: ($json.taxable_amount ?? null), cgst_amount: ($json.cgst ?? null), sgst_amount: ($json.sgst ?? null), igst_amount: ($json.igst ?? null), round_off_amount: ($json.round_off ?? null), total_amount: ($json.total_amount ?? null) }, confidence_score: ($json.confidence_score ?? null), low_confidence_fields: ($json.low_confidence_fields || []), warnings: ($json.review_warnings || []), salvaged: true, error_message: ($json._meta?.error || 'Extraction failed after retry') }) }}

conditions.leftValue: ={{ (() => { const mode = String($json.postingMode || $json.posting_mode || '').toUpperCase(); const forceRaw = $json.forceAutoPost ?? $json.force_auto_post ?? false; const forceText = String(forceRaw).toLowerCase(); const forceAuto = forceRaw === true || forceText === 'true' || forceText === '1'; return mode === 'REVIEW_BEFORE_POSTING' && !forceAuto; })() }}
